+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "podman-container-tools-17403-bug-podman-machine-fails-to-start-with-exit-status-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "podman-container-tools: [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit status 255 on Mac",
+    "description": "[Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit status 255 on Mac. This issue affects 21+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:\n```bash\npodman --version\npodman info --format json | jq .version\n```\nLook for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review podman-container-tools configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant podman-container-tools configuration:\n### Issue Description\n\nThere seems to be an issue when trying to start Podman with `podman machine start` when using macOS and QEMU. I created a Podman machine about two months ago but now the machine fails to start."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit status 255\u2026",
+        "description": "Took a look at this and I'm still struggling to find a correct solution - This error code definitely comes from a [failed SSH call](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/03578810759b35e9f15e4452a29d8667f1fcced1/pkg/machine/qemu/machine.go#L688) during the while mounting directories into the VM\n```yaml\npodman machine start \nStarting machine \"podman-machine-default\"\nWaiting for VM ...\nMounting volume... /Users/me:/Users/me\nError: exit status 255\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: Podman machine fails to start with exit\u2026 is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\nTest podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Took a look at this and I'm still struggling to find a correct solution - This error code definitely comes from a [failed SSH call](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/03578810759b35e9f15e4452a29d8667f1fcced1/pkg/machine/qemu/machine.go#L688) during the while mounting directories into the VM during the start.  The solutions above indicate that it's a race condition, however, we do",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "podman machine start \nStarting machine \"podman-machine-default\"\nWaiting for VM ...\nMounting volume... /Users/me:/Users/me\nError: exit status 255",
+        "{\"QMP\": {\"version\": {\"qemu\": {\"micro\": 0, \"minor\": 2, \"major\": 7}, \"package\": \"\"}, \"capabilities\": [\"oob\"]}}\n{ \"execute\": \"qmp_capabilities\"} \n{\"return\": {}}\n{ \"execute\": \"query-status\" }\n{\"return\": {\"status\": \"running\", \"singlestep\": false, \"running\": true}}",
+        "netstat -ap tcp | grep -i listen\ntcp4       0      0  localhost.50810        *.*                    LISTEN"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
